text:

> graphics/dcraw-m
>

> I'm happy to host it. So here's a diff that should restore it.

> changes distinfo
> 
> FWIW Feel free to put me as MAINTAINER, should the current one

>

P.S. Should probably also mention;
did NOT bump PORTREVISION
